dashboard.label: PhishNet AI — Blast Radius
dashboard.description: Security + observability fusion: did the phishing payload actually execute? The attack chain in one timeline.

search.query: | inputlookup phishnet_decisions | search recommended_action!="close" | dedup alert_id | sort alert_id | table alert_id
| inputlookup phishnet_decisions | search alert_id="$alert_tok$" | head 1 | table alert_id
| inputlookup phishnet_decisions | search alert_id="$alert_tok$" | head 1 | eval subject=if(isnull(subject) OR subject="", "n/a", subject) | table subject
| inputlookup phishnet_decisions | search alert_id="$alert_tok$" | head 1 | eval sender=if(isnull(sender) OR sender="", "n/a", sender) | table sender

| inputlookup phishnet_decisions | search alert_id="$alert_tok$" | head 1 | eval v=upper(verdict) . " · " . case(payload_executed="true" OR payload_executed="True" OR payload_executed=1, "PAYLOAD EXECUTED", true(), "no execution detected") | table v
| inputlookup phishnet_decisions | search alert_id="$alert_tok$" | head 1 | eval host=if(isnull(affected_host) OR affected_host="", "n/a", affected_host) | table host

| inputlookup phishnet_decisions | search alert_id="$alert_tok$" | head 1 | eval exposure=coalesce(recipient_count, 0) . " recipients · " . coalesce(users_clicked, 0) . " clicked · " . coalesce(creds_submitted, 0) . " creds submitted" | table exposure

| inputlookup phishnet_decisions | search alert_id="$alert_tok$" | head 1 | eval blast_timeline_text=if(isnull(blast_timeline_text) OR blast_timeline_text="", "—\tNo payload execution chain recorded for this alert.", blast_timeline_text) | makemv delim=" || " blast_timeline_text | mvexpand blast_timeline_text | rex field=blast_timeline_text "^(?<time>[^\t]+)\t(?<event>.+)$" | table time, event | sort time

| inputlookup phishnet_decisions | search alert_id="$alert_tok$" | head 1 | eval endpoint_metrics_text=if(isnull(endpoint_metrics_text) OR endpoint_metrics_text="", "", endpoint_metrics_text) | makemv delim=" || " endpoint_metrics_text | mvexpand endpoint_metrics_text | rex field=endpoint_metrics_text "^(?<ts>[^\t]+)\t(?<cpu_pct>[^\t]+)\t(?<net_out_kb>.+)$" | eval _time=strptime(ts, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") | eval cpu_pct=tonumber(cpu_pct), net_out_kb=tonumber(net_out_kb) | sort _time | rename cpu_pct AS "CPU %", net_out_kb AS "Outbound KB" | table _time, "CPU %", "Outbound KB"

panel.title: Agent Reasoning Chain — how the verdict was reached

search.query: | inputlookup phishnet_decisions | search alert_id="$alert_tok$" | head 1 | eval steps_text=if(isnull(steps_text) OR steps_text="", "neutral\tno_data\t-\tNo investigation steps recorded for this alert.", steps_text) | makemv delim=" || " steps_text | mvexpand steps_text | rex field=steps_text "^(?<signal>[^\t]+)\t(?<check>[^\t]+)\t(?<tool>[^\t]+)\t(?<finding>.+)$" | streamstats count AS step | eval signal=upper(signal) | rename step AS "#", signal AS "Signal", check AS "Check", tool AS "Tool / Source", finding AS "Finding" | table "#", "Signal", "Check", "Tool / Source", "Finding"

| inputlookup phishnet_decisions | search alert_id="$alert_tok$" | head 1 | eval confidence=round(confidence*100, 0) . "%" | rename verdict AS "Verdict", confidence AS "Confidence", reasoning AS "Reasoning", recommended_action AS "Recommended Action" | table "Verdict", "Confidence", "Recommended Action", "Reasoning"
